nasb.text: Pursue love, yet desire earnestly spiritual gifts, but especially that you may prophesy.

esv.text: Pursue love, and earnestly desire the spiritual gifts, especially that you may prophesy.

cnv.text: 你們要追求愛，也要熱切地渴慕屬靈的恩賜，特別是先知講道的恩賜。

ccb.text: 你们要追求爱，也要切慕属灵的恩赐，尤其是做先知讲道的恩赐。

csbs.text: 你们要追求爱，也要渴慕属灵的事，但更要渴慕做先知传道。
